headline: A Look At Pentair (PNR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Pentair (PNR) stock has been under pressure, with the price down about 19% over the past month and roughly 26% over the past 3 months. This has drawn attention to its current valuation and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Pentair. At a share price of US$73.41, Pentair’s short term share price return has been weak, with the stock down sharply over the past quarter. Its 3 year total shareholder return remains positive, suggesting longer term holders have still seen gains even as recent...
